mapper.select:
/** UsptEvlStepDao.selectList */ select b.evl_step_id , b.evl_plan_id , b.evl_step_nm , b.sort_ordr_no , b.evl_step_sttus_cd , b.slctn_target_co , b.drpt_stdr_cd , b.top_lwet_excl , b.dspth , b.dspth_dt , b.creator_id , b.created_dt , b.updater_id , b.updated_dt from uspt_evl_plan a inner join uspt_evl_step b on a.evl_plan_id = b.evl_plan_id where a.evl_plan_id = #{evlPlanId}
and b.sort_ordr_no = '1' /*첫번째 단계에만 대상자 등록함*/

/** UsptEvlStepDao.selectExistList */ select b.evl_step_id , b.evl_plan_id , b.evl_step_nm , b.sort_ordr_no , b.evl_step_sttus_cd , b.slctn_target_co , b.drpt_stdr_cd , b.top_lwet_excl , b.dspth , b.dspth_dt , b.creator_id , b.created_dt , b.updater_id , b.updated_dt from uspt_evl_plan a inner join uspt_evl_step b on a.evl_plan_id = b.evl_plan_id where a.evl_plan_id = #{evlPlanId} and b.evl_step_id = #{evlStepId}
